title: Delhi court rejects petition seeking FIR against Kapil Mishra over Delhi riots
description: A Delhi court on Friday dismissed a petition seeking registration of first information report (FIR) against Delhi law minister Kapil Mishra in connection with the Delhi riots of 2020.Additional Chief Judicial Magistrate (ACJM) Ashwani Panwar of the Rouse Avenue Court rejected the plea by Yamuna Vihar resident Mohammad Ilyas under Section 156(3) CrPC (175(3) of BNSS), which empowers the magistrate to order registration of FIR in cognisable offences A detailed order is awaited.
